children.name: The design system built for AI-Human collaboration

textStyle.characters:
The design system built for 
AI-Human collaboration

children.name: While modern teams explore how they might build AI-enabled design systems, I built something more. DesignerPunk is an ecosystem that pairs an enterprise-ready design system with built-in intelligence layers that guide AI agents to deliver craft at scale.

textStyle.characters:
While modern teams explore how they might build AI-enabled design systems, I built something more.

DesignerPunk is an ecosystem that pairs an enterprise-ready design system with built-in intelligence layers that guide AI agents to deliver craft at scale.

children.name: Scaled design tokens, themes, and tools that generate and govern native code for iOS, Android, and Web platforms.

textStyle.characters: Scaled design tokens, themes, and tools that generate and govern native code for iOS, Android, and Web platforms.

children.name: A component architecture that guides cross-platform development through a shared, property-based API.

textStyle.characters: A component architecture that guides cross-platform development through a shared, property-based API.

children.name: Harness-less MCP servers, agents, and other automated intelligence mechanisms for accurate documentation and consistent implementation.

textStyle.characters: Harness-less MCP servers, agents, and other automated intelligence mechanisms for accurate documentation and consistent implementation.

children.name: Product UX & Systems Architect + AI Engineer

textStyle.characters: Product UX & Systems Architect + AI Engineer

children.name: What can I accomplish with your team?

textStyle.characters: What can I accomplish with your team?

children.name: After 18 years as a product designer, 10 creating and managing design systems, I’m leveraging my experience in UX design and research, product management, and front-end development to deliver solutions for Humans and AI Agents that meet the needs of the AI era. I believe projects like DesignerPunk are just the starting point of this new frontier, and I’m excited to learn and share. I’m aiming to join, or partner with, an organization that is equally curious about exploring this rapidly evolving technology environment, and lead teams to confront these new challenges head-on. If you are member of such an organization and would like to discuss more, please, reach out to me via LinkedIn.

textStyle.characters:
After 18 years as a product designer, 10 creating and managing design systems, I’m leveraging my experience in UX design and research, product management, and front-end development to deliver solutions for Humans and AI Agents that meet the needs of the AI era. I believe projects like DesignerPunk are just the starting point of this new frontier, and I’m excited to learn and share.

I’m aiming to join, or partner with, an organization that is equally curious about exploring this rapidly evolving technology environment, and lead teams to confront these new challenges head-on.

If you are member of such an organization and would like to discuss more, please, reach out to me via LinkedIn.

recommendations.description: Single component with a variant prop
recommendations.rationale: Variants differ only in visual styling, making a single component with a variant prop the simplest API surface.
tradeoffs: Simpler consumer API — one import, one tag.
Internal complexity grows if behavioral differences emerge later.

recommendations.rationale: A split structure future-proofs the component for behavioral divergence, though current variants are styling-only.
tradeoffs: Clean separation of behavioral contracts per component.
Aligns with Stemma inheritance pattern used across DesignerPunk.
More components to maintain and document.

componentTokens.rationale: space.space500 is used across 2 properties (padding-right, padding-left). Consistent usage suggests semantic intent that could be encoded as a component token.
